name: upload_screens_from_images
description:
Uploads one or more images into a Stitch project as new screens. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF formats.

**Input Requirements:**
1. **`projectId` (string - MANDATORY):** Numeric ID only — no `projects/` prefix.
2. **`images` (array - MANDATORY):** Array of image objects with base64 content and MIME type.

projectId.description: Required. Numeric project ID only — do NOT include 'projects/' prefix.

images.description: Required. Array of images to upload.

ImageUpload.description: An image to upload as a screen.

fileContentBase64.description: Base64-encoded image data. No data: URI prefix.

outputComponents.description: Array of output components with session information.
